name: clk
description: Two clocks (type 6). comp0 (speed 1) free-runs the whole time on an undriven, always-low enable input (link0). comp2 (speed 2) is gated by a UserInput enable (link2): a HIGH enable freezes it (output forced low, unsubscribed), a LOW enable resumes it. Exercises the period toggle for two speeds plus the input-gating subscribe/unsubscribe path.
